summary.key_theme: Reddit 股價近期面臨 39 % 的顯著回調，儘管公司在 AI 領域與廣告業務擴張上展現成長潛力，但仍受宏觀經濟壓力、競爭加劇及英國監管罰款等負面因素干擾。

bullish.title: Did Reddit’s Breakout Profitability, AI Push, and $1 Billion Buyback Just Shift RDDT’s Investment Narrative?
bullish.reason: 公司展現 70 % 的營收年增率，並宣布 10 億美元的股票回購計畫，加上 AI 業務推動，顯示基本面強勁，有助於重塑投資人信心。

bullish.title: PulsePoint Scales HCP Omnichannel Offering with Reddit Integration
bullish.reason: 透過與 PulsePoint 整合，Reddit 成功切入醫療保健行銷領域，擴大廣告變現管道，對營收成長具正面意義。

bearish.title: RDDT Stock Down 39% in the Past Three Months: Should You Hold or Fold?
bearish.reason: 股價在三個月內下跌 39 %，反映市場對宏觀經濟壓力及平台競爭加劇的擔憂，此篇涵蓋了股價疲軟的核心原因。

bearish.title: Reddit Weighs UK Children’s Data Fine Against New Healthcare Ad Opportunity
bearish.reason: 遭英國資訊專員辦公室處以數百萬英鎊罰款，顯示隱私合規風險，將對公司獲利能力造成短期負面影響。

bearish.title: Is Reddit (RDDT) Pricing Make Sense After This Year’s 39% Share Price Slump
bearish.reason: 探討股價是否反映其內在價值，市場對其估值合理性存疑，加劇了投資人的觀望情緒。

neutral.title: Managing $120K in Student Loans on an $80K Salary: Should You Pay More Than the Minimum?
neutral.reason: 僅為 Reddit 平台上的使用者討論內容，對公司股價無直接財務影響。

neutral.title: Lyft Is Down 79% and Reddit Is Asking If Bankruptcy Is Next
neutral.reason: 新聞主要討論 Lyft 的財務狀況，Reddit 僅作為討論平台被提及，非公司本身營運新聞。

neutral.title: Many Believe An LLC Lets You Deduct Personal Expenses Or Even A New Luxury Car. Here's What You Need To Know Before Trying
neutral.reason: 引用 Reddit 用戶討論作為稅務教育素材，對公司基本面無影響。

neutral.title: Reddit Traders Are Cheering Moderna While Bears Watch the Cash Burn
neutral.reason: 討論 Reddit 用戶對 Moderna 股票的看法，屬於散戶情緒觀察，非 Reddit 公司本身動態。

neutral.title: Reddit Traders Continue to Like Peloton (PTON) Stock’s Volatility
neutral.reason: 報導 Reddit 用戶對 Peloton 的交易興趣，與 Reddit 公司營運無關。

neutral.title: Some Homeowners Are So Uncomfortable With Public Property Records That They're Putting Their Houses In Revocable Trusts. Are They Just Paranoid?
neutral.reason: 引用 Reddit 用戶討論作為房地產話題，對公司股價無影響。

neutral.title: What's Driving the Market Sentiment Around Reddit Inc?
neutral.reason: 標題性新聞，未提供具體驅動因素細節，影響力有限。
